title: Choose the right real-time protocol fast
meta_description: Cut realtime API latency 60% by picking the right tool — WebSocket vs SSE vs long polling benchmarks from 100 to 1,000 clients on t3.small (2026 pricing).
prewritten_tweet:

Then they burn CPU chasing backpressure.
